meanings.definition: a rapid change in brightness; a brief spark or flash

examples: Unquarried marble sparkled on the hillside

meanings.definition: be lively or brilliant or exhibit virtuosity
examples: his playing coruscated throughout the concert hall
A high tension wire, brought down by a storm, can continue to spark

meanings.definition: become bubbly or frothy or foaming
shining with brilliant points of light like stars
used of wines and waters; charged naturally or artificially with carbon dioxide
